Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.BottleneckStatus

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.BottleneckStatus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator
public static class ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.BottleneckStatus extends Object implements Serializable
Active bottleneck metadata for a process-model evaluation.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • BottleneckStatus

      public BottleneckStatus()
      Default constructor for serialization frameworks.

    • BottleneckStatus

      public BottleneckStatus(String areaName, String equipmentName, String constraintName, double utilization, double currentValue, double designValue, String unit, boolean feasible)
      Creates a bottleneck status.
      Parameters:
      areaName - process area name
      equipmentName - equipment name
      constraintName - constraint name
      utilization - utilization fraction
      currentValue - current constraint value
      designValue - design constraint value
      unit - constraint unit
      feasible - true when utilization is less than or equal to one

  • Method Details

    • none

      public static ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.BottleneckStatus none()
      Creates an empty bottleneck status.
      Returns:
      status with no active equipment

    • getAreaName

      public String getAreaName()
      Gets the area name.
      Returns:
      area name

    • getEquipmentName

      public String getEquipmentName()
      Gets the equipment name.
      Returns:
      equipment name

    • getQualifiedEquipmentName

      public String getQualifiedEquipmentName()
      Gets the area-qualified equipment name.
      Returns:
      area-qualified equipment name, or empty string when not available

    • getConstraintName

      public String getConstraintName()
      Gets the constraint name.
      Returns:
      constraint name

    • getUtilization

      public double getUtilization()
      Gets the utilization fraction.
      Returns:
      utilization fraction

      Gets the current value.

      current constraint value

      Gets the design value.
      Returns:
      design constraint value

    • getUnit

      public String getUnit()
      Gets the unit of measure.
      Returns:
      unit of measure

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible()
      Checks whether the bottleneck is feasible.
      Returns:
      true when utilization is less than or equal to one

    • isPresent

      public boolean isPresent()
      Checks whether this status contains an equipment reference.
      Returns:
      true when equipment name is available
